sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3701" key="a)krwrei=tai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρωρ-εῖται</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n3701.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inhabitants of mountain ridges</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0543.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:869" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.869</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
